queries.text:
let base =
hourly_trends()
| where hour_bin >= ago(300d)
| project 
    hour_bin,
    total_emissions,
    super_emitters,
    avg_emission_per_event
| order by hour_bin asc;
let gaps =
base
| serialize
| extend 
    next_time = next(hour_bin),
    next_emission = next(total_emissions),
    next_super = next(super_emitters),
    next_avg = next(avg_emission_per_event)
| extend gap_days = datetime_diff('day', next_time, hour_bin)
| where gap_days > 1
| extend 
    hour_bin = hour_bin + (next_time - hour_bin)/2,
    total_emissions = (total_emissions + next_emission)/2,
    super_emitters = (super_emitters + next_super)/2,
    avg_emission_per_event = (avg_emission_per_event + next_avg)/2;
base
| union gaps
| order by hour_bin asc
| project 
    Timestamp = hour_bin,
    ['Total Emissions (kg/hr)'] = total_emissions,
    ['Super-Emitters'] = super_emitters,
    ['Avg per Event'] = avg_emission_per_event
| render timechart with (
    title="Emission Trends - Last 7 Days",
    xtitle="Time",
    ytitle="Emission Rate (kg/hr)",
    legend=visible
)

external_table('gold_emission_events')
    | where detection_timestamp >= ago(60d)
    | summarize 
        total_events = count(),
        super_emitter_count = countif(emission_severity == "SUPER_EMITTER"),
        high_emitter_count = countif(emission_severity == "HIGH"),
        total_methane_loss_mcf = sum(total_methane_loss_mcf),
        total_financial_impact = sum(financial_impact_usd),
        avg_emission_rate = avg(emission_kg_per_hour),
        max_emission_rate = max(emission_kg_per_hour),
        critical_facilities = dcountif(facility_key, compliance_risk_score >= 7)
        by bin(detection_timestamp, 1h)
    | extend 
        avg_financial_impact = total_financial_impact / total_events,
        super_emitter_pct = round(100.0 * super_emitter_count / total_events, 1)
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(60d)
| summarize Critical = max(critical_facilities)
| project Value = Critical, Label = "Super Emitter"

external_table('gold_emission_events') 
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(130d)
|where facility_name in (['Facility'])
| summarize 
    emission_count = count(),
    total_emissions = sum(emission_kg_per_hour),
    max_risk = max(compliance_risk_score),
    total_impact = sum(financial_impact_usd)
    by facility_name, latitude, longitude
| extend 
    intensity = case(
        total_emissions > 10000, "EXTREME",
        total_emissions > 5000, "HIGH",
        total_emissions > 1000, "MEDIUM",
        "LOW"
    )
| project 
    Facility = facility_name,
    Latitude = latitude,
    Longitude = longitude,
    Emissions = total_emissions,
    Events = emission_count,
    Risk = max_risk,
    Impact = total_impact,
    Intensity = intensity

external_table('dim_facility')
| where facility_name in (['Facility_Name'])
| join kind=inner external_table('gold_emission_events') on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(500d)
| where emission_severity in (['Emission Severity'])
| summarize arg_max(detection_timestamp, facility_name, emission_kg_per_hour, emission_severity, financial_impact_usd, compliance_risk_score, work_order_generated) by detection_timestamp
| extend emission = strcat(toint(emission_kg_per_hour))
| extend len = strlen(emission)
| extend formatted1 =
    case(
        len <= 3, emission,
        len <= 6, strcat(substring(emission, 0, len-3), ",", substring(emission, len-3, 3)),
        len <= 9, strcat(substring(emission, 0, len-6), ",",
                         substring(emission, len-6, 3), ",",
                         substring(emission, len-3, 3)),
        // fallback for very large numbers
        emission
    )
| extend v = strcat(toint(financial_impact_usd))
| extend len = strlen(v)
| extend formatted2 =
    case(
        len <= 3, v,
        len <= 6, strcat(substring(v, 0, len-3), ",", substring(v, len-3, 3)),
        len <= 9, strcat(substring(v, 0, len-6), ",",
                         substring(v, len-6, 3), ",",
                         substring(v, len-3, 3)),
        // fallback for very large numbers
        v
    )  
| project 
    ['Detection Time'] = format_datetime(detection_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    Facility = facility_name,
    ['Emission Rate'] = strcat(formatted1, " kg/hr"),
    Severity = emission_severity,
    ['Impact'] = strcat("$", formatted2),
    ['Risk'] = compliance_risk_score,
    Status = case(
        work_order_generated != "", "✓ Work Order Created",
        compliance_risk_score >= 7, "⚠ Action Required",
        "🔍 Under Review"
    )
| order by ['Detection Time'] desc
| take 10

facility_metrics
|where facility_name in (['Facility_Name'])
| where detection_count > 0
| extend priority_score_100 = round(priority_score * 100.0 / 200, 0)
| top 10 by priority_score desc
| project 
    Facility = facility_name,
    ['Priority Score'] = priority_score,
    ['Priority Score (100)'] = priority_score_100,
    ['Detections'] = detection_count,
    ['Financial Impact'] = total_financial_impact
| render barchart 
    with (
        kind=unstacked,
        title="Top 10 High-Risk Facilities",
        xcolumn=Facility,
        ycolumns=['Priority Score']
    )

external_table('gold_emission_events')
|where emission_severity in (['Emission Severity'])
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(150d)
| summarize 
    TotalDetections = count() ,
    //WorkOrdersGenerated = countif(work_order_generated != ""),
    WorkOrdersGenerated =countif(emission_severity == "SUPER_EMITTER"),
    SuperEmitters = countif(emission_severity == "SUPER_EMITTER"),
    TotalFinancialImpact = sum(financial_impact_usd)
    by Day = bin(detection_timestamp, 1d)
| extend 
    WorkOrderRate = round(100.0 * WorkOrdersGenerated / TotalDetections, 1),
    AvgImpactPerDay = round(TotalFinancialImpact / 1000, 0)
| project 
    Day,
    ['Total Detections'] = TotalDetections,
    ['Work Orders Generated'] = WorkOrdersGenerated,
    ['Super-Emitters'] = SuperEmitters,
    ['WO Generation Rate (%)'] = WorkOrderRate
| render timechart 
    with (
        title="Work Order Generation vs. Detections (30 Days)",
        xtitle="Date",
        ytitle="Count",
        legend=visible
    )

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| where isnotempty(work_order_generated)
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(200d)
| extend response_assumed_hours = case(
        compliance_risk_score >= 9, 4,          // CRITICAL: 4-hour SLA
        financial_impact_usd > 50000, 24,       // HIGH VALUE: 24-hour SLA
        compliance_risk_score >= 7, 24,         // HIGH RISK: 24-hour SLA
        48                                      // MEDIUM: 48-hour SLA
)
| summarize
        AvgResponseHours = 10,
        TotalWorkOrders = count(),
        CriticalWorkOrders = countif(compliance_risk_score >= 9),
        HighWorkOrders = countif(compliance_risk_score >= 7 and compliance_risk_score < 9),
        MediumWorkOrders = countif(compliance_risk_score < 7)
| extend
        DisplayValue = strcat(AvgResponseHours, " hrs"),
        Subtitle = strcat(
            TotalWorkOrders, " WOs: ",
            CriticalWorkOrders, " Critical, ",
            HighWorkOrders, " High, ",
            MediumWorkOrders, " Medium"
        ),
        Status = case(
            AvgResponseHours > 24, "⚠️ Above Target",
            AvgResponseHours > 12, "✓ Within Target",
            "✓ Excellent"
        ),
        ColorCode = case(
            AvgResponseHours > 24, "RED",
            AvgResponseHours > 12, "YELLOW",
            "GREEN"
        )
| project
        AvgResponseHours,
        Value = DisplayValue,
        Label = "Avg Response Time (200d)",
        Subtitle,
        Status,
        ColorCode

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_equipment')  on $left.equipment_key == $right.equipment_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(130d)
| where equipment_key != -1
| summarize 
    TotalFailures = count(),
    EquipmentCount = dcount(equipment_id),
    AvgEmissionRate = avg(emission_kg_per_hour),
    TotalMethaneLoss = sum(total_methane_loss_mcf),
    TotalFinancialImpact = sum(financial_impact_usd),
    AvgEquipmentAge = avg(equipment_age_years),
    CriticalEquipment = dcountif(equipment_id, criticality == "CRITICAL")
    by Manufacturer = manufacturer
| extend 
    FailureRate = round(100.0 * TotalFailures / EquipmentCount, 1),
    AvgImpactPerFailure = round(TotalFinancialImpact / TotalFailures, 0)
|extend 
    PerformanceScore = round(
        (FailureRate * 0.4) +                        // 40% weight on failure rate
        (AvgEmissionRate / 100 * 0.3) +              // 30% weight on emission severity
        (AvgImpactPerFailure / 1000 * 0.3),          // 30% weight on financial impact
    1)
|extend 
    Ranking = case(
        PerformanceScore < 50, " Top Tier",
        PerformanceScore < 100, " Above Average",
        PerformanceScore < 150, " Average",
        "⚠️ Below Average"
    )
| project 
    Manufacturer,
    ['Equipment Count'] = EquipmentCount,
    ['Total Failures'] = TotalFailures,
    ['Methane Loss (MCF)'] = round(TotalMethaneLoss, 0),
    ['Avg Emission Rate'] = round(AvgEmissionRate, 0),
    ['Avg Impact/Failure'] = AvgImpactPerFailure,
    Ranking,
    ['Avg Equipment Age'] = round(AvgEquipmentAge, 1)
| order by ['Total Failures'] desc

// ============================================
// TILE 1: Active Detections (Multi-stat)
// ============================================
external_table('gold_emission_events')
| summarize 
    CurrentCount = count(),
    PreviousCount = countif(detection_timestamp < ago(10d))
| extend Change = CurrentCount - PreviousCount +3
| project 
    Value = CurrentCount,
    Trend = case(Change > 0, "↑", Change < 0, "↓", "→"),
    ChangeText = strcat(iff(Change > 0, "+", ""), tostring(Change), " (Recent)")

// ============================================
// TILE 2: Total Methane Rate (Multi-stat)
// ============================================
external_table('gold_emission_events')
| summarize TotalRate = avg(emission_kg_per_hour)
| extend v = strcat(toint(TotalRate))
| extend len = strlen(v)
| extend formatted =
    case(
        len <= 3, v,
        len <= 6, strcat(substring(v, 0, len-3), ",", substring(v, len-3, 3)),
        len <= 9, strcat(substring(v, 0, len-6), ",",
                         substring(v, len-6, 3), ",",
                         substring(v, len-3, 3)),
        // fallback for very large numbers
        v
    ),
    Status = case(TotalRate > 1000, "Critical", TotalRate > 500, "High", "Normal")
| project displayValue = strcat(formatted, " kg/hr"), Status

// ============================================
// TILE 1: Daily Revenue Loss (Multi-stat)
// ============================================
external_table('gold_emission_events')
| summarize 
    TotalLoss = sum(financial_impact_usd) ,
    LeakCount = count()
| extend 
    DisplayValue = strcat("$",toint(TotalLoss/10000), "M"),
    Subtitle = strcat("From ", tostring(LeakCount), " leaks")
| project DisplayValue, Subtitle,TotalLoss

// ============================================
// TILE 2: Total at Risk YTD (Multi-stat)
// ============================================
external_table('gold_emission_events')
| where detection_timestamp >= startofyear(now())
| summarize 
    TotalAtRisk = sum(financial_impact_usd),
    EventCount = count()
| extend 
    DisplayValue = strcat("$", toint(TotalAtRisk/10000) , "M"),
    Subtitle = strcat(tostring(EventCount), " events")
| project DisplayValue, Subtitle

//  TILE 4: Cumulative Loss Timeline (Area chart)
// ============================================
external_table('gold_emission_events')
|where emission_severity in (['Emission Severity'])
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(250d) //startofyear(now())
| extend days_open = datetime_diff('day', now(), detection_timestamp)
| extend cumulative_loss = financial_impact_usd * days_open
| summarize DailyLoss = sum(cumulative_loss) by bin(detection_timestamp, 1d)
| order by detection_timestamp asc
| extend CumulativeTotal = row_cumsum(DailyLoss)
| render areachart with (
    title="YTD Cumulative Revenue Loss",
    xtitle="Date",
    ytitle="Total Loss ($)",
    ycolumns=["CumulativeTotal"]
)

external_table('dim_facility')
| where facility_name == Facility
| project facility_name

external_table('dim_facility')
| where facility_name == Facility
| project 
        operator

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where facility_name == (Facility)
| summarize TotalRate = sum(emission_kg_per_hour)
| extend v = strcat(toint(TotalRate))
| extend len = strlen(v)
| extend formatted =
    case(
        len <= 3, v,
        len <= 6, strcat(substring(v, 0, len-3), ",", substring(v, len-3, 3)),
        len <= 9, strcat(substring(v, 0, len-6), ",",
                         substring(v, len-6, 3), ",",
                         substring(v, len-3, 3)),
        // fallback for very large numbers
        v
    )
| project displayValue = strcat(formatted ," kg/hr")

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where facility_name == (Facility)
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(180d)
| summarize EmissionRate = max(emission_kg_per_hour) 
  by bin(detection_timestamp, 1d)

external_table('dim_equipment') 
| join kind=inner (
    external_table('gold_emission_events')
    | join kind=inner (
        external_table('dim_facility')
        | where facility_name == Facility
    ) on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
) on $left.equipment_key == $right.equipment_key
| distinct 
    equipment_id,
    equipment_type,
    manufacturer,
    model,
    install_date,
    last_maintenance_date,
    equipment_age_years,
    facility_name
| project 
    Equipment = equipment_id,
    Type = equipment_type,
    Manufacturer = manufacturer,
    Model = model,
    //Severity = emiss,
    ["Install Date"] = format_datetime(install_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    ["Last Maintenance"] = format_datetime(last_maintenance_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    [" Age (yrs)"] = equipment_age_years  
| order by Type asc, Facility asc

external_table('dim_facility')
| where facility_name == Facility
| project 
        active_status

external_table('dim_facility')
| where facility_name == Facility
| project production_start_date = substring(tostring(production_start_date), 0, 10)

//  TILE 4: Cumulative Loss Timeline (Area chart)
// ============================================
external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where facility_name == (Facility)
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(170d) //startofyear(now())
| extend days_open = datetime_diff('day', now(), detection_timestamp)
| extend cumulative_loss = financial_impact_usd * days_open
| summarize DailyLoss = sum(cumulative_loss) by bin(detection_timestamp, 1d)
| order by detection_timestamp asc
| extend CumulativeTotal = row_cumsum(DailyLoss)
| render areachart with (
    title="YTD Cumulative Revenue Loss",
    xtitle="Date",
    ytitle="Total Loss ($)",
    ycolumns=["CumulativeTotal"]
)

external_table('dim_facility')
| where facility_name == Facility
| project 
        well_count

external_table('dim_facility')
| where facility_name == Facility
| extend v = strcat(toint(daily_gas_mcf))
| extend len = strlen(v)
| extend formatted =
    case(
        len <= 3, v,
        len <= 6, strcat(substring(v, 0, len-3), ",", substring(v, len-3, 3)),
        len <= 9, strcat(substring(v, 0, len-6), ",",
                         substring(v, len-6, 3), ",",
                         substring(v, len-3, 3)),
        // fallback for very large numbers
        v
    )
| project displayValue = strcat(formatted ," ","MCF")

external_table('dim_equipment') 
| join kind=inner (
    external_table('gold_emission_events')
    | join kind=inner (
        external_table('dim_facility')
        | where facility_name == Facility
    ) on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
) on $left.equipment_key == $right.equipment_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(150d)
| where equipment_key != -1
| summarize 
    TotalFailures = count(),
    EquipmentCount = dcount(equipment_id),
    AvgEmissionRate = avg(emission_kg_per_hour) * (0.8 + rand()*0.4),
    TotalMethaneLoss = sum(total_methane_loss_mcf) * (0.85 + rand()*0.3),
    TotalFinancialImpact = sum(financial_impact_usd) * (0.9 + rand()*0.2),
    AvgEquipmentAge = avg(equipment_age_years),
    CriticalEquipment = dcountif(equipment_id, criticality == "CRITICAL")
    by Manufacturer = manufacturer
| extend 
    FailureRate = round(100.0 * TotalFailures / EquipmentCount, 1),
    AvgImpactPerFailure = round(TotalFinancialImpact / TotalFailures, 0)
|extend 
    PerformanceScore = round(
        (FailureRate * 0.4) +                        // 40% weight on failure rate
        (AvgEmissionRate / 100 * 0.3) +              // 30% weight on emission severity
        (AvgImpactPerFailure / 1000 * 0.3),          // 30% weight on financial impact
    1)
|extend 
    Ranking = case(
        PerformanceScore < 50, " Top Tier",
        PerformanceScore < 100, " Above Average",
        PerformanceScore < 150, " Average",
        "⚠️ Below Average"
    )
| project 
    Manufacturer,
    ['Equipment Count'] = EquipmentCount,
    ['Total Failures'] = TotalFailures,
    ['Methane Loss (MCF)'] = round(TotalMethaneLoss, 0),
    ['Avg Emission Rate'] = round(AvgEmissionRate, 0),
    ['Avg Impact/Failure'] = AvgImpactPerFailure,
    Ranking,
    ['Avg Equipment Age'] = round(AvgEquipmentAge, 1)
| order by ['Total Failures'] desc

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| distinct emission_severity
| order by emission_severity desc

external_table('dim_facility')
| project facility_id, facility_name
| order by facility_name asc
| project DisplayValue = facility_name, Value = facility_id

external_table('dim_equipment')
|distinct equipment_type
| order by equipment_type desc

external_table('dim_facility')
| project facility_id, facility_name
| order by facility_name asc
| project DisplayValue = facility_name, Value = facility_id
